prompt: Diagnose the most likely fault or failure mode and explain what evidence supports it.
scenario: In a T4 work setting, the evaluated element is E-401 Receptacles & switches within 2.1 Electrical. The relevant subcategory is 2.1.4 Devices & Equipment. The observed field condition is: GFCI missing in wet/kitchen/garage locations. The work is being assessed at the in-service lifecycle state with source anchors NEC 210.8, 406.4, 406.9.
title: T4 E-401 Fault diagnosis
